name: Mirastar Federal Credit Union
description_short: Mirastar Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and wealth advisory services.
description_long:
Mirastar Federal Credit Union is a community-focused, not-for-profit financial cooperative that operates as a member-owned institution. The organization emphasizes its mission to create strong, vibrant communities where financial prosperity is accessible to individuals, families, students, and neighborhoods. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Mirastar structures itself around member benefit rather than shareholder profit.

Mirastar offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services including deposit accounts (checking, savings, money market, certificates), lending products (auto loans, home loans, personal loans, credit cards), online and mobile banking platforms, and wealth advisory services. They actively promote seasonal savings programs such as their Momentum Savings account with prize drawings up to $10,000, and advertise competitive rates on certificates of deposit (up to 4.10% APY) and vehicle loans (as low as 4.990% APR). The institution also provides fraud protection education and member support services.

Mirastar distinguishes itself through explicit community commitment, emphasizing values of uplifting communities, prioritizing people, creating opportunities, and delivering exceptional service. The organization positions itself as a "people-first" entity with an inclusive culture and commitment to financial education, offering blog content on topics like fraud prevention and personal finance management. Their membership-based structure means profits theoretically benefit members rather than external shareholders.

As a credit union, Mirastar likely has membership eligibility requirements not disclosed on the homepage, which may limit accessibility compared to traditional banks. The website provides limited transparency on fee structures, membership criteria, or specific account requirements. While they advertise competitive rates, verification through independent sources would be necessary to confirm actual rate competitiveness against other credit unions and banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Not-for-profit, member-owned structure means financial benefits return to members rather than shareholders
Competitive CD rates advertised at 4.10% APY on limited-time 11 or 15-month terms
Comprehensive product suite including auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, and credit cards under one institution
Active fraud prevention education and explicit commitment to never requesting credentials via phone or text
Wealth advisory services available with dedicated advisors for financial planning
Seasonal savings programs like Momentum Savings with cash prize drawings up to $10,000
Online and mobile banking services for convenient account access
cons: Membership eligibility criteria not disclosed on website, suggesting potential restrictions on who can join
Limited fee structure transparency provided on public-facing website
No specific information about minimum balance requirements for most account types
VISA credit card APR starts at 14.49%, which is in the standard to higher range
No mention of branch count, geographic service area, or expansion plans
best_for: Community-minded individuals seeking member-owned financial institution benefits
Consumers eligible for credit union membership seeking competitive deposit and loan rates
Individuals interested in wealth planning and personalized financial advisory services
Savers looking for high-yield CD rates with limited-time promotional offers
diagnosis: Mirastar Federal Credit Union is best for individuals eligible for credit union membership who prioritize community impact and member-focused financial services. The main caveat is that credit union membership typically has eligibility requirements not specified on their website, and independent verification of advertised rates and fees against competitors is recommended before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 255 N White Rd, San Jose, CA 95127
